item.title: Answering key offseason questions for every NFL team: Intel on free agency, QB decisions and draft options
item.description: Which teams will make a splash move? Which teams must make adjustments? We answered big offseason questions.

item.title: 11 draft prospects with a true first-round grade
item.description: There's a difference between going in Round 1 and being graded in Round 1, so who makes the list?

item.title: The top 10 women's college basketball games left in the regular season
item.description: Regular-season titles, conference tournament seeds and NCAA tournament hopes are on the line.

item.title: Grades, lessons learned and big questions from Team USA's 5-1 win over Germany
item.description: An American win seemed inevitable, sending the team through to the quarterfinals. Here's what stood out the most.

item.title: 📈 Men's NCAA Tournament Bubble Watch
item.description: Seton Hall is still fourth in a Big East expected to send three teams to the NCAA tournament.
